channel.title: GitHub Groovy Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Groovy in GitHub

item.title: jenkinsci/pipeline-examples
item.description: A collection of examples, tips and tricks and snippets of scripting for the Jenkins Pipeline plugin

item.title: rundeck/rundeck
item.description: Enable Self-Service Operations: Give specific users access to your existing tools, services, and scripts

item.title: SmartThingsCommunity/SmartThingsPublic
item.description: SmartThings open-source DeviceType Handlers and SmartApps code

item.title: openboxes/openboxes
item.description: OpenBoxes is a supply chain management system designed to manage inventory and track stock movements for healthcare facilities.

item.title: AdobeDocs/experience-manager-65.en
item.description: This is the repository for Adobe Experience Manager 6.5 documentation. Your contributions to the documentation are welcome.
